description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Retention Factor is a factor representing how aggressively capital should be retained to fund the Stability Capital Buffer. It is calculated according to the following formula:
The Retention Factor starts at 25% and scales upward with Total USDS Supply, recognizing that capital accumulation becomes more critical as USDS gains in systemic importance.
For example, with USDS Supply of 8 billion, the Retention Factor would be approximately 26%.
